'''mohashaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:quadcore|quadcore]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-h-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quadcore|quadcore]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| mohashaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:mohashithi|mohashithi]] || [[word:mohashiji|mohashiji]] || [[word:mohashishi|mohashishi]] || [[word:mohashiki|mohashiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:mohashuthuthu|mohashuthuthu]] || [[word:mohashujuju|mohashujuju]] || [[word:mohashushushu|mohashushushu]] || [[word:mohashukuku|mohashukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:mohashuthu|mohashuthu]] || [[word:mohashuju|mohashuju]] || [[word:mohashushu|mohashushu]] || [[word:mohashuku|mohashuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:mohashufthuf|mohashufthuf]] || [[word:mohashufjuf|mohashufjuf]] || [[word:mohashufshuf|mohashufshuf]] || [[word:mohashufkuf|mohashufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:mohashethe|mohashethe]] || [[word:mohasheje|mohasheje]] || [[word:mohasheshe|mohasheshe]] || [[word:mohasheke|mohasheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:mohashothotho|mohashothotho]] || [[word:mohashojojo|mohashojojo]] || [[word:mohashoshosho|mohashoshosho]] || [[word:mohashokoko|mohashokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:mohashotho|mohashotho]] || [[word:mohashojo|mohashojo]] || [[word:mohashosho|mohashosho]] || [[word:mohashoko|mohashoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:mohashofthof|mohashofthof]] || [[word:mohashofjof|mohashofjof]] || [[word:mohashofshof|mohashofshof]] || [[word:mohashofkof|mohashofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:mohashĂŻfthĂŻf|mohashĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:mohashĂŻfjĂŻf|mohashĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:mohashĂŻfshĂŻf|mohashĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:mohashĂŻfkĂŻf|mohashĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:mohashĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|mohashĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:mohashĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|mohashĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:mohashĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|mohashĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:mohashĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|mohashĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:mohashĂŻfthĂŻf|mohashĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:mohashĂŻfjĂŻf|mohashĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:mohashĂŻfshĂŻf|mohashĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:mohashĂŻfkĂŻf|mohashĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:mohashĂŻfthĂŻf|mohashĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:mohashĂŻfjĂŻf|mohashĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:mohashĂŻfshĂŻf|mohashĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:mohashĂŻfkĂŻf|mohashĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:mohashĂŠthĂŠ|mohashĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:mohashĂŠjĂŠ|mohashĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:mohashĂŠshĂŠ|mohashĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:mohashĂŠkĂŠ|mohashĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:mohashathatha|mohashathatha]] || [[word:mohashajaja|mohashajaja]] || [[word:mohashashasha|mohashashasha]] || [[word:mohashakaka|mohashakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:mohashatha|mohashatha]] || [[word:mohashaja|mohashaja]] || [[word:mohashasha|mohashasha]] || [[word:mohashaka|mohashaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:mohashafthaf|mohashafthaf]] || [[word:mohashafjaf|mohashafjaf]] || [[word:mohashafshaf|mohashafshaf]] || [[word:mohashafkaf|mohashafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:mohashasha|mohashasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:mohashĂ«sha|mohashĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:mohashrosha|mohashrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:mohashmusha|mohashmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:mohashyasha|mohashyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomohashnkshĂ«sha|gomohashnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomohashnkrosha|gomohashnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomohashnkmusha|gomohashnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomohashnkyasha|gomohashnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:mohahashasha|mohahashasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:mohahashĂ«sha|mohahashĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:mohahashrosha|mohahashrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:mohahashmusha|mohahashmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:mohahashyasha|mohahashyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomohahashnkshĂ«sha|gomohahashnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomohahashnkrosha|gomohahashnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomohahashnkmusha|gomohahashnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomohahashnkyasha|gomohahashnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:mehĂŠshasha|mehĂŠshasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:mehĂŠshĂ«sha|mehĂŠshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:mehĂŠshrosha|mehĂŠshrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:mehĂŠshmusha|mehĂŠshmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:mehĂŠshyasha|mehĂŠshyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomehĂŠshnkshĂ«sha|gomehĂŠshnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomehĂŠshnkrosha|gomehĂŠshnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomehĂŠshnkmusha|gomehĂŠshnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomehĂŠshnkyasha|gomehĂŠshnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:mohfashasha|mohfashasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:mohfashĂ«sha|mohfashĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:mohfashrosha|mohfashrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:mohfashmusha|mohfashmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:mohfashyasha|mohfashyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomohfashnkshĂ«sha|gomohfashnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomohfashnkrosha|gomohfashnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomohfashnkmusha|gomohfashnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomohfashnkyasha|gomohfashnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]

{{wordpage|bfc4f79}}
